name: process-and-robustness-principles
description: Framework-agnostic design principles for design process, accessibility, iteration, and robustness against edge cases. Covers Accessibility, Iteration, Factor of Safety, Prototyping, Weakest Link, Scaling Fallacy, and Ockham's Razor.

interface.shortDescription: Accessibility, iteration, prototyping, reliability, and pruning.
interface.longDescription: Framework-agnostic design principles for design process, accessibility, iteration, and robustness against edge cases. Covers Accessibility, Iteration, Factor of Safety, Prototyping, Weakest Link, Scaling Fallacy, and Ockham's Razor.
